title: Tangy Canadian Applesauce Bake
description: A tangy and fluffy Canadian-inspired dessert featuring applesauce and bhuna spices, perfect for a special treat. This recipe is Jain-friendly and can be easily customized to suit your taste preferences.
instructions: Prepare a 9x9-inch baking dish by greasing it with butter or non-stick spray.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the melted butter, eggs, vanilla extract, and bhuna spice blend to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
Stir in the applesauce until well combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before dusting with confectioners sugar.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
